name: Carrot Bundle Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Place carrots and enough water in a saucepan to cover them. Bring to a boil and cook over medium heat until the carrots are crispy tender (6-8 minutes).
3. In a small bowl, combine all ingredients except fish; set aside.
4. Separate fish fillets and divide carrots equally among the fillets.
5. Wrap each fillet around each portion of carrots.
6. Place the bundles in a 9-inch square baking pan (lightly sprayed with grease).
7. Sprinkle the stuffing mixture over the fish bundles.
8. Cover and bake for 10 minutes.
9. Uncover and continue baking for 8-10 more minutes, or until the fish flakes easily with a fork.
